rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH DICK VS. LA GALLERIA CONDOMINIUM OWNERS' ASSOCIATION, A NON
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings Of Plaintiff
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 23, 2023 line 1. RESPONDENT LA GALLERIA CONDOMINIUM OWNERS ASSOCIATION Notice Of And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings Of Plaintiff is continued to July 14, 2023 on Court's own motion.=(501/HLJ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: LAURIE BURKE VS. GREENWICH PROPERTIES, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Compel Plaintiffs To Respond To Discovery And To Serve Further Responses To Discovery And To Produce Documents For A Monetary Sanction And For Issue And Evidentiary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 23, 2023 line 2. DEFENDANT GREENWICH PROPERTIES, LLC Motion To Compel Plaintiffs To Respond To Discovery And To Serve Further Responses To Discovery And To Produce Documents For A Monetary Sanction And For Issue And Evidentiary Sanctions is GRANTED. Objections asserted in the responses are overruled. Plaintiff to provide complete verified responses without objections by 9:00 a.m. on June 26, 2023. No sanctions.=(501/HLJ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: LAURIE BURKE VS. GREENWICH PROPERTIES, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Motion For Leave Of Court To Augment The Expert Witness Designation And Declaration
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 23, 2023 line 2. PLAINTIFF LAURIE BURKE Amended Notice Of Motion For Leave Of Court To Augment The Expert Witness Designation And Declaration is GRANTED to substitute previously disclosed experts. To the extent the newly disclosed experts have not yet been deposed, the experts shall be made available starting at 2:00 p.m. on June 26, 2023 and everyday thereafter. The depositions dates and times shall be coordinated with the trial judge to not coincide with any scheduled appearances in the trial department. Plaintiff's counsel shall cover the costs (difference between the standard and expedited rates) of the expedited transcripts and scheduling of any such depositions. No further sanctions. =(501/HLJ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests.
